svg.text: AGENT HIERARCHY — orchestrator spawns sub-agents via ctx.as_agent()
role: ORCHESTRATOR · creates root AgentContext · namespace: "project:acme"
SHARED CONTEXT — each agent gets a child context (immutable, returns new instance)
DATA FLOW — how memories are written and recalled
3-layer = Tag(DocumentStore) + BFS(GraphStore) + Vector(VectorStore) → RRF → MMR → budget fit
NAMESPACE ISOLATION — memories scoped per namespace, same physical store
"User prefers Python over Java" [planner] superseded: false
— all namespaces live in same physical store, filtered at query time
DISTRIBUTED MODE — remote agents use MemoryClient → HTTP → Memwright API → same storage roles
